title: API /containers/stats does not support query parameter "one-shot"
body:
For API endpoint /containers/stats, to be compatible the query parameter  "one-shot" and associated logic should be added.

https://docs.docker.com/engine/api/v1.41/#operation/ContainerStats

See https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/9126

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@rhatdan I might be able to figure this one out. I found the proper files to edit, just might take me a bit to orient myself as to what is going on.
see #10517 for PR regarding this issue.
